title: Pragmatic Evaluation of Large Language Models in Healthcare
text: Large Language Models (LLMs) and LLM-based tools are becoming ubiquitous in healthcare. However, there is a dearth of analyses evaluating the efficacy of these tools. This tutorial has three learning objectives for participants:

title: Pragmatic Evaluation of Large Language Models in Healthcare
text:
Program

Introduction to LLMs in healthcare (Hojjat)
Architecture of an LLM-based application (Abdul)
Review of language model evaluation frameworks, benchmarks, and metrics (Abdul)

Frameworks vs. Benchmarks vs. Rubrics vs. Metrics
Frameworks: HELM, Med-HELM, and others
Benchmarks: MedQA, HealthBench, and others
Rubric: TER, COMET, PDSQI-9, and others
Metric: relevance, correctness, toxicity, etc.

LLM-as-a-judge. Introduction to the DeepEval Python library (Ashley)
Case studies (Ashley)

Translation evaluation
Patient-facing web chatbot
Hospital knowledgebase search assistant
